name: LINE+ Developers
description: LINE+ (Seongnam-based LY Corp. arm) developer platform — Messaging API, LIFF, LINE Login and LINE Pay.

seo.title: LINE+ Developers — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: LINE+ Developers: LINE+ (Seongnam-based LY Corp. arm) developer platform — Messaging API, LIFF, LINE Login and LINE Pay.

when_to_use: LINE Messaging API for chatbot in Japanese market
LINE Login OAuth for Korean and Japanese user auth
LINE Pay integration for mobile payment in East Asia
LIFF mini-app development on LINE platform
Bot automation for customer service in LINE channel

pros: Direct access to 90M+ LINE users in Japan and TW
Messaging API, LIFF and Login in one ecosystem
Mature docs and SDKs for regional developers
cons: Essentially mandatory only if your users live on LINE
Review and bot approval process can be slow
Rate limits and messaging costs add up fast
Limited value outside Japan, Taiwan, Thailand
review.verdict: If you sell to LINE-heavy markets, this is table stakes; elsewhere, not particularly useful.
review.best_for: Brands and apps targeting Japan, Taiwan or Thailand where LINE dominates
review.not_for: Products with no user base on LINE — use WhatsApp or SMS instead

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
